parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a prior response.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by content type: flow, checklist, launcher, banner, survey.

parameters.name: published
parameters.description: Filter to content published in at least one environment (true) or none (false).

parameters.name: createdAfter
parameters.description: Only items created at or after this ISO 8601 time.

parameters.name: createdBefore
parameters.description: Only items created at or before this ISO 8601 time.

post.description: Duplicate into a new content (copies the edited version's steps / config / data).
Set a version as the live version in an environment (idempotent).
Clear an environment's live version for the content.
Fork the content's current edited version into a new draft.

patch.description: Write steps, start/hide rules, themeId, or type-specific data to a draft version.

get.description: Dry-run usability check: the same rules `publish` enforces, without mutating. Returns errors (these block publish) and advisory warnings.

post.description: Fork a historical version forward as the new draft.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a prior response.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Filter to a user with this email.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: Filter to users in this company.

parameters.name: segmentId
parameters.description: Filter to users in this segment.

parameters.description: Only items created at or before this ISO 8601 time.

put.description: Add a user to the company, or update the membership (idempotent).

delete.description: Remove a user from the company.

parameters.name: bizType
parameters.description: Filter to user or company segments.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a prior response.

put.description: Add a user or company (per the segment's bizType) to a manual segment.

parameters.name: externalId
parameters.description: User or company external ID (per segment bizType)

404.description: Segment, user, or company not found

delete.description: Remove a user or company (per the segment's bizType) from a manual segment.

parameters.name: externalId
parameters.description: User or company external ID (per segment bizType)

404.description: Segment, user, or company not found

get.description: Sessions in this environment. Filter by contentId / userId.

parameters.name: completed
parameters.description: Filter to completed (true) or open (false) sessions.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a prior response.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Inline: answers, content, company, user, version.

parameters.description: Only items created at or after this ISO 8601 time.

post.description: Create an environment in the project. The first one is made primary.

delete.description: Delete an environment. The primary / last environment cannot be deleted.

info.title: Usertour API v2
info.description: Project-scoped v2 API — personal API token (utp_) authentication.

markdown.description: A small markdown subset: paragraphs, `# `/`## ` headings (h1/h2 only — no h3+), `-`/`*` and `1.` lists, ``` code fences; inline `**bold**`, `*italic*`, `[text](url)`, and `{{ attribute_code | default: "x" }}` for user attributes.

step.description: Target step: a step `key` declared elsewhere in the same write, or an existing step cvid. Resolved server-side to the cvid.

text.description: Optional visible text the matched element must contain — narrows the selector match (selector + text). Omit to match by selector alone.

nth.description: 0-based index of the match to use when the selector resolves to multiple elements.

mode.description: once = show a single time; multiple = up to N times per window; unlimited = every time the conditions match (subject to `every`).

every.description: Re-show window. Used by `multiple` (with `times`) and `unlimited`; ignored for `once`. If omitted for those modes a default window is applied.

themeId.description: Theme applied to the initial draft version. Required for every type except `tracker` (which has no UI) — content has no usable styling without one. List options with the themes endpoint; use the one with isDefault if unsure.

name.description: Name for the copy (defaults to the source name).

environmentId.description: Target environment (defaults to the source content’s environment).
The environment to publish into (its live version is set).

versionId.description: The version to publish as that environment’s live version.

environmentId.description: The environment to clear the live version in.

key.description: Optional author-chosen handle for wiring "go to step" actions within this request (unique among the steps you send). A button action can set `step` to this key to target this step even before it exists. Write-only — not stored, not returned on read.

type.description: Step kind. Only `tooltip` anchors to a target element; the rest are page-level.

themeId.description: Per-step theme override. Omit to keep the current value; set to a theme id (from list_themes) to override; set to null to clear and inherit the flow theme.

selector.description: A stable CSS selector for the element in your app.

text.description: Optional visible text the matched element must contain — narrows the selector match (selector + text). Omit to match by selector alone.

nth.description: 0-based index of the match to use when the selector resolves to multiple elements.

explicitCompletionStep.description: Marks this step as an explicit completion point — reaching it completes the flow.

step.description: Target step: a step `key` declared elsewhere in the same write, or an existing step cvid. Resolved server-side to the cvid.

onClick.description: Actions to run when the user clicks the step's target element (click-to-advance). Tooltip steps with a `target` only.

every.description: Re-show window. Used by `multiple` (with `times`) and `unlimited`; ignored for `once`. If omitted for those modes a default window is applied.
